info.name: School Edu Sphere
info.description: Student API collection (Students, Parents, Academic Records).

item.name: Get Announcements By School And Target

body.raw:
{
  "schoolId": "SCHOOL_ID_HERE",
  "title": "Updated: Welcome to New Academic Year",
  "content": "Classes begin next Tuesday at 9 AM instead of Monday.",
  "target": "student",
  "date": "2026-07-02",
  "sender": "Principal Office"
}

item.name: Get Academic Year By School & Name
Get Academic Year Containing A Date
Add Holidays To Academic Year (one or many)
Add Weekly Off (expands every SUNDAY into dated entries)
Remove Weekly Off Series (whole day of week)
Get Staff By School and Role
Get Fees By School And Academic Year
Get Inquiries By School And Status
Get Admissions By School And Status

request.description: Convert an admission (id in the URL) into an enrolled student. The body mirrors the create-student payload — the frontend prefills name/admissionNo/dob/gender/admissionDate from the admission and bloodGroup is entered here. schoolId and academicYear are accepted for payload parity but IGNORED: the school comes from the admission, and the academic year is NOT set at conversion (an admission carries no year) — assign it afterwards via POST /api/students/{id}/academic-records. Guardians are copied from the admission automatically and de-duplicated (reused when name+phone or name+email exists).

exec: pm.test("Direct admission is not linked to an inquiry", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().inquiryDocsId).to.be.oneOf([null, undefined]); });

request.description: // Test case 2: Direct admission with every client-editable field. No inquiry must be read or updated.

exec: pm.test("Direct student is not linked to an admission", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().admissionDocsId).to.be.oneOf([null, undefined]); });
pm.test("Academic record id is stored", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().currentAcademicRecordDocsId).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("Guardian links use guardianDocsId", function () { const guardians = pm.response.json().guardians; pm.expect(guardians).to.be.an("array").that.is.not.empty; pm.expect(guardians[0].guardianDocsId).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

request.description: Direct student creation test matrix. Required fields: schoolId, admissionNo, name. admissionDocsId is server-owned and always remains null for this API. Use guardianDocsId to link an existing guardian, or provide guardian details to find/create and deduplicate one. Academic placement must be supplied inside currentAcademicRecord; top-level academic placement fields are rejected.

item.name: Get Students By School And Academic Year

exec: pm.test("Class teacher reference uses classTeacherDocsId", function () { pm.expect(body.classTeacherDocsId).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });
pm.test("Subject teacher references use teacherDocsId", function () { (body.subjects || []).forEach(s => pm.expect(s.teacherDocsId).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty); });

item.name: Get Classes By School And Academic Year

exec: pm.test("Updated class teacher reference is returned", function () { pm.expect(body.classTeacherDocsId).to.be.a("string"); });

pm.test("Response contains the added subject", function () { const subject = (body.subjects || []).find(s => (s.name || "").startsWith("Chemistry ")); pm.expect(subject, "added subject").to.exist; pm.expect(subject.teacherDocsId).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });
pm.test("Deprecated teacher field is not persisted", function () { (body.subjects || []).forEach(s => pm.expect(s).not.to.have.property("teacher")); });

Get Academic Results By School and Student

exec: pm.test("Academic record pointer is stored", function () { pm.expect(body.currentAcademicRecordDocsId).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });
